Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing intersection, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: right, center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, glass, brick, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp
- landscape: grass strip, hedge, flower bed, mulch
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2015
Smartphone era fully arrived. A 2015 station — LED-lit canopy, digital price sign, video ads playing on every pump screen, and a big convenience store.

PERIOD DETAILS
- pumps with color screens playing ads
- large modern canopies with LED lighting
- price sign showing gas around $2.45
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of BP
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.- window signs: 'ATM INSIDE', 'UNLIMITED CAR WASH $19.99/MO'
- an air-and-vacuum island at the lot edge
- a chalkboard A-frame sign advertising the coffee bar
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 4 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver vacuuming his car at the vacuum island
- a clerk stacking windshield-washer fluid by the door
- a young couple pushing a jogging stroller
Clothing: men in boat shoes, skinny jeans; women in statement necklaces, infinity scarves. Fashion palette: coral, mint green, navy. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2013-2017 Honda Accord — clean modern lines — white
- 2007-2017 Jeep Wrangler — boxy off-roader, round headlights — blue
- 2012-2015 Honda Civic — compact, angular — black
- 2015-2020 Ford F-150 — aluminum body, C-clamp headlights — gray
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2015.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments, fiber optic lines on poles

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: very young sapling
- deciduous tree at background: mature tree, full canopy
- deciduous tree at right: mature tree, full canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — DSLR or smartphone camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: clean, minimal noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2007-2017 Jeep Wrangler — boxy off-roader, round headlights
2015-2020 Ford F-150 — aluminum body, C-clamp headlights
